name: smart-audit
description: AI-powered smart contract auditor. Detects vulnerabilities, scores security, and auto-generates fixed code. MCP-ready API for AI agents and CreateOS Skills.

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: Optional: Enables AI-enhanced vulnerability explanations via OpenAI

OPENAI_MODEL.description: OpenAI model to use for AI enrichment

NEXT_PUBLIC_ETHERSCAN_API_KEY.description: Optional: Enables fetching contracts by address from Etherscan

endpoints.description: Audit a Solidity smart contract. Returns security score, findings, and grade.

input.code: string — Solidity source code to audit

mcp.toolDescription: Audit Solidity smart contracts for security vulnerabilities. Returns a security score, letter grade, and detailed findings with recommendations.

code.description: Solidity smart contract source code to audit
